mapper.insert:
insert into sys_post_warehouse(post_id, warehouse_id, tenant_id) values
(#{item.postId},#{item.warehouseId},#{item.tenantId})
mapper.select: select warehouse_id from sys_post_warehouse where post_id=#{postId}
mapper.update: update sys_post_warehouse pw inner join sys_post p on p.post_id = pw.post_id set pw.tenant_id = p.tenant_id where pw.post_id = #{postId} and (pw.tenant_id is null or pw.tenant_id = '') and p.tenant_id is not null and trim(p.tenant_id) != ''

update sys_post_warehouse pw inner join fd_warehouse w on w.id = pw.warehouse_id set pw.tenant_id = w.tenant_id where pw.post_id = #{postId} and (pw.tenant_id is null or pw.tenant_id = '') and w.tenant_id is not null and trim(w.tenant_id) != ''

update sys_post_warehouse pw inner join sys_post p on p.post_id = pw.post_id set pw.tenant_id = p.tenant_id where (pw.tenant_id is null or pw.tenant_id = '') and p.tenant_id is not null and trim(p.tenant_id) != ''

update sys_post_warehouse pw inner join fd_warehouse w on w.id = pw.warehouse_id set pw.tenant_id = w.tenant_id where (pw.tenant_id is null or pw.tenant_id = '') and w.tenant_id is not null and trim(w.tenant_id) != ''
